_note: legal_review_agent registration disabled in dev. The IMPORT recipe is canonical (sys.path injection — see other-examples/legal-contract-review/agent/graph.py), but `langgraph dev` ALSO enforces 'Local dependency must be a subdirectory of the config file', which rejects `../other-examples/legal-contract-review/agent`. pnpm smoke's static probe imports cleanly; `langgraph dev` does not. To activate in dev: (a) move agent/langgraph.json to project root so the dependency becomes a subdirectory, or (b) run a second langgraph dev server on a different port for the legal agent.
